source: Diagnostic Deal Briefing Analysis generated from information provided by the deal team.
privacyNote: Uses only details approved for inclusion in the customer-facing report.
executiveReadinessRead: Replace this with the executive readiness read from the Deal Readiness Report.
Keep this customer-facing, polished, and focused on what has been evidenced, what remains unproven, and what next move creates decision clarity.
forecastConfidenceRationale: Replace with the rationale for the forecast confidence read.
visibleSignal: Replace with the visible signal from the deal context.
informationProvided: Replace with a short summary of what information was provided.
Replace with any important limits on the source material.
executiveSummary: Replace with the first executive summary paragraph.
Replace with the second executive summary paragraph.
Replace with the third executive summary paragraph.

pathToDecisionReadiness.evidenceToCreate: Replace with the evidence the next move should create.
pathToDecisionReadiness.assumptionToValidate: Replace with the assumption the team needs to validate.
pathToDecisionReadiness.whoToInvolve: Replace with the stakeholders who should be involved.

decisionReadinessOverview: Replace with decision readiness overview paragraph.
Replace with second overview paragraph if needed.
patternInterpretation: Replace with why this pattern matters.
alignmentAndUrgencyRead: Replace with alignment and urgency read.
recommendedNextMove: Replace with the primary recommended next move.
Replace with how to run that move.
appendixSignalDetail: Replace with appendix or signal detail.
